programme.desc: A prairie-town sheriff uncovers a drug ring that includes its most powerful law enforcement officials; to help bring them down, he calls in the FBI; just before the trial, the ring's kingpin makes a deal, and days later, he's dead.

programme.title: Murder in the Wicked West
